svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(223, 246, 243), rgb(15, 34, 32)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(13, 148, 136), rgb(45, 161, 151));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 378px; height: 1px; padding-top: 70px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Alternative
Raw packet / SYN scan model

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(238, 229, 255), rgb(41, 33, 55)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(124, 58, 237), rgb(197, 141, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 80px; margin-left: 501px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Strengths
- clear contracts
- simple deployment
- inspectable artifacts
- fits current scale

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 226, 226), rgb(57, 33, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(185, 28, 28), rgb(255, 156, 156));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 80px; margin-left: 861px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Costs
- throughput ceiling stays local
- one process owns pacing logic

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 247, 237), rgb(30, 23, 15)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(194, 65, 12), rgb(251, 140, 94));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 270px; margin-left: 501px;

div.div:
Benefits if adopted
- elastic scaling
- separated scheduling

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 226, 226), rgb(57, 33, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(185, 28, 28), rgb(255, 156, 156));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 270px; margin-left: 861px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Why rejected now
- higher operational burden
- more moving parts than requirements justify

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 247, 237), rgb(30, 23, 15)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(194, 65, 12), rgb(251, 140, 94));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 480px; margin-left: 501px;

div.div:
Benefits if adopted
- lower-level packet control
- potentially different performance profile

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 226, 226), rgb(57, 33, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(185, 28, 28), rgb(255, 156, 156));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 480px; margin-left: 861px;

div.div:
Why rejected now
- diverges from current Go net model
- harder to validate and operate safely

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(71, 85, 105), rgb(155, 167, 184));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 558px; height: 1px; padding-top: 255px; margin-left: 1391px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Review thesis
The design intentionally favors reviewability, stability, and operational clarity over speculative capability.
